# Work Checklist

## Before Implementation

- Read `INDEX.md` first.
- Read required files in order.
- Confirm scope and constraints in `SESSION_CURRENT.md`.

## During Implementation

- Keep changes small and targeted.
- Update session progress when plan changes.

## After Implementation

- Verify behavior with available build/test tasks.
- Document key decisions in session notes.
- Leave clear follow-up items if work is partial.
